x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Who is allowed to earn incentives.

Comment:
Example: Only active cardholders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Qualifying Activity Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
What actions earn incentives.

Comment:
Example: Card spending, referrals, bill payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Rate Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
How much is earned per activity.

Comment:
Example: 1 point per $1 spent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Threshold Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Minimum activity required.

Comment
Example: Minimum $10 transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Maximum incentives that can be earned.

Comment:
Example: Max 5,000 points per month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Posting Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
When incentives are credited.

Comment:
Example: End-of-day or monthly posting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Validity Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: How long earned incentives remain usable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Reversal Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions under which earned incentives are reversed.

Comment:
Example: Refund reverses points.
